reviews.review_description: If i can play with motion controller then i will give 5 stars

developer_response.body: Hi Artem-Jana1992! Thank you for writing a feedback. I will forward your request to the relevant people to have a look on it and I hope we can make some adjustments in the future, so that the game will be more enjoyable for you! Thank you for your patience!

reviews.review_description: I played for a few hours and i feel like i just scratched the surface here.  Feel like a game you could play and unlock stuff for a long time.  Im having fun so far

Lots of fun. The upgrade options and custtimizations allow for some challenging gameplay. Being able to survey your domain in VR is awesome. I'd love to be able to lean in to see the action up close. If only the rift didn't cost a kidney down here in Australia.
could be great game but graphic is really bad, wish they could improve it a bit
Runs perfect on my s7. Lots of depth to this game and many hours of fun to be had. Hoping they add multiplayer.

reviews.review_title: Great game. Desperately needs an update
reviews.review_description: Great fun, lots to do, genuinely funny and long. Hard aiming was always tricky though and felt unfair. If they update it with the motion controller it would be a definite 5 star and one of the best games on here.

I loved this game on my Xbox and when I saw it on here I was really excited! It's just as fun if not more and it's great to be able to look around at the game board and see everything that's going on. This is a beautiful game made even better! I wish more games got ported over like this.
This game needs a fix now! It's so slow on my S6 Edge+, the controllers are bad, and it's kinda boring, can I have my money back?
In the second mission of the campaign mode the screen goes black and the game stop work. Fix it or refund my money
Pretty addictif the screams of the wolves describe how fun this game is i propose my kingdom for a horse with five star on it

I enjoy this game and so does my 8yo son. It's a real time strategy with some Angry Birds-like action elements. I never played the non-VR version but I later downloaded it for comparison.  I would say the VR makes it more enjoyable although it's not a fantastic use of VR tbh. My other criticism is the same as the others - I dread aiming the overly sensitive ballista.  It really shouldn't be that difficult.  Maybe they can add a "pointer" to aim with the headset (as in many other GearVR games). I think that would be ideal!
Extremely low FPS on Oculus Go. It makes me VR sick. Otherwise it is a fantastic game.

developer_response.body: Hi MarquisDeSang! Could you find a solution to your FPS problem? If not please contact us at support@zenstudios.com! We should be able to find a solution to that.

reviews.review_description: Finally a gear vr game that actually feels like a game. There are four campaigns with a real story to them. Hope to see more games like this in the store, and not those tech demos we are seeing allot.
it's too difficult to controll aim arrow by controller, plz fix it or return my money back……
Amazing honestly so much content for 10$ and im not 100% sure about folks having control issues mines just fine. With a standard xbox 1 controller i would give it a go if you like action and strategy
